title: Iran warns ships it's 'unacceptable and dangerous' to transit the Strait of Hormuz without their approval
summary_full: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.
summary_public: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran warns ships it's 'unacceptable and dangerous' to transit the Strait of Hormuz
